hero.title: Sebastián Benjamín Rivera Novillo
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer
hero.description: Highly proactive and creative professional specialized in software development and mobile applications. Committed to technical excellence, continuous learning, and innovation in digital solutions that create real impact.

about.title: Professional Profile
about.description: Software Engineering student with solid technical background and extensive practical experience in mobile application development and data analysis. I am highly proactive, creative, and have exceptional ability to work in teams under pressure. I maintain a constant commitment to continuous learning, technological innovation, and excellence in every project I develop.
about.education: Universidad de las Fuerzas Armadas ESPE

company1.name: Ecuagraphic
company1.description: Full development of a commercial mobile application for a leading Ecuadorian company in the graphic sector. Implementation of solutions aimed at improving corporate digital presence and optimizing the end-user experience through intuitive interfaces and innovative features.

company2.name: Brain Training Club (CEC)
company2.description: Facilitation of specialized workshops introducing programming and modern digital tools. Design and implementation of didactic methodologies for teaching fundamental programming concepts, promoting logical and structured thinking in students.

company3.name: Independent Academic Tutoring
company3.description: Personalized academic support in mathematics and physics, developing effective learning strategies and problem-solving methods. Comprehensive support for students to strengthen their competencies in exact sciences through teaching approaches adapted to different learning styles.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: Available for professional opportunities, innovative project collaborations, and technical consultations. Feel free to reach out.
contact.proposalText: I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Don't hesitate to contact me directly.
